song.title: I Want To Be Filled With the Triune God
song.lyrics:
[V1] .C I want to be filled with the triune God. . G He makes me happy, . F G C I want to be filled with Him. . I want to be filled with the triune God. . G He makes me happy, . F G C I want to be filled with Him.
[V2] . F So I will drink, drink, drink, drink, drink . C That living water. . G I will eat, eat, eat, eat, eat . C That tree of life. . F I will call upon His name . C A7 Oh, Lord Jesus!
[V3] .F G I want to be filled up, up, up! .F G I want to be filled up, up, up! .F G I want to be filled up, up, up - .C F C G With Him!
